chat-main root Group with data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-CHAT

gaps.finding: new-conversation btn ai_RNbBHXbH renders 'New conversation' with Plus icon; Bubble static text is 'New' only.
conversation-sidebar subtree ai_RNbBHXbK (RepeatingGroup ai_RNbBHXbL) not marked inside ai_RNbBHXbE; brownfield thread list used as interim slot content.

critiques.finding: Button label on ai_RNbBHXbH is 'New conversation' plus a Lucide Plus icon; Bubble IR static text for the same element is 'New'. Layout AC is satisfied but copy diverges from source.
critiques.alternative: Match Bubble copy ('New') or resolve full text expression from IR if dynamic; drop decorative icon unless IR cell template includes it.

critiques.finding: Sidebar slot content is brownfield prototype thread list without data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXbK / ai_RNbBHXbL markers. Acceptable for CHAT-01 layout boundary but leaves conversation-sidebar IR subtree unmarked until CHAT-02.
critiques.alternative: In CHAT-02, wrap thread list in ConversationSidebar with ai_RNbBHXbK root and migrate RG/cell hierarchy per decompose.

critiques.finding: ai_RNbBHXbG and ai_RNbBHXbH use bubbleStyle() className but omit data-style-ref attributes present on other migrated screens (e.g. DashboardCheckinCard).
critiques.alternative: Add data-style-ref='Text_heading_3_' on title and data-style-ref='Button_primary_' on button for automated parity selectors.
